Reviews Contact

Elevate Your Chicago Kitchen

Transform your space with tailored designs built for Chicago living. From historic bungalows to modern condos, we craft kitchens that endure our harsh climate.

★★★★★ 6+ Verified Reviews

What We Do

Our Services

Professional kitchen remodel solutions tailored to your needs.

Custom Cabinetry

Handcrafted storage solutions designed for Chicago's unique homes.

Learn More →

Quartz Countertops

Durable surfaces engineered for Chicago's extreme temperature swings.

Learn More →

Smart Kitchen Upgrades

Technology integrations that respect Chicago's architectural heritage.

Learn More →

Historic Kitchen Restoration

Preserving Chicago's architectural legacy one kitchen at a time.

Learn More →

Universal Design Kitchens

Accessible layouts for Chicago's aging housing stock.

Learn More →
Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality kitchen remodel services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees
Get Pre-Approved →
Licensed & Insured

Full protection on every project

Certified Professionals

Certified professionals

Warranty Protected

Industry-leading warranty coverage

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

The team salvaged the original 1923 built-in pantry in our Logan Square two-flat and converted it to a functional spice kitchen. Their tile specialist matched the hexagonal border perfectly using fragments we found behind the walls. Five winters later, everything still looks immaculate.

Marjorie K.
★★★★★

Our Gold Coast condo's new motion-activated under-cabinet lighting has been life-changing during dark winter mornings. The installers hid all wiring in the original moldings—you'd never know it wasn't part of the 1930s building. Even the doorman commented on how tasteful the tech upgrades are.

Andre S.
★★★★★

After two failed installations from other companies, Onyx finally gave us countertops that don't show condensation rings in our humid Naperville summers. They suggested a matte finish that complements our midcentury cabinets and included a hidden hot pad drawer for winter cookware storage.

Linh T.
★★★★★

My mother can now safely use her Evanston kitchen after Onyx's redesign. The pull-down shelving system means she doesn't strain reaching, and the heated floor prevents slips. Most importantly, it still looks like her historic home—not a clinical space.

David R.
★★★★★

The custom banquette seating with hidden storage has transformed our Lincoln Park kitchen. It accommodates holiday crowds but tucks away neatly for daily use. The craftsmen even incorporated ventilation slots to prevent moisture buildup against our exterior brick wall.

Sophia M.
★★★★★

Our Aurora multigenerational home needed tech that worked for everyone. Onyx installed voice-controlled lighting with Spanish and English commands, plus a stove that automatically turns off if left unattended. The kids love the charging drawer disguised as an old flour bin.

Carlos V.
★★★★★
Read All Reviews →
How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Who We Are

A Local Business For Your Local Community

Onyx Kitchen Remodel is proud to serve our neighbors with honest, quality service. 12+ Years Experience

Our Promise

Why Choose Onyx Kitchen Remodel

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How do you handle uneven walls in old Chicago homes?
We scribe cabinets to fit irregular surfaces and use shim systems developed specifically for the area's settling foundations. No gap fillers needed.
Can you match my historic trim details?
Our workshop maintains profiles for common Chicago molding patterns from 1890-1940. We'll replicate your home's original character.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's Onyx Kitchen Remodel.

Ready to get started? Fill out the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
